hook.text: Did you know 38% of patient calls go unanswered after hours?
hook.visual_suggestion: A phone ringing with no one picking up, followed by a frustrated patient hanging up.

scene_1.text: Missed calls mean missed patients. They hang up and call someone else.
scene_1.visual_suggestion: A visual of a patient searching for alternative clinics on their phone.

scene_2.text: What if AI could handle those calls? No more voicemails, no more losses.
scene_2.visual_suggestion: Animation showing an AI system answering a call and helping a patient.

scene_3.text: Patient calls in. AI triages in seconds. Books or escalates instantly.
scene_3.visual_suggestion: A simple flowchart showing the call process: Incoming Call -> AI Triage -> Booking/Escalation.

scene_4.text: One clinic reduced no-shows by 40% in just 3 months. No extra staff.
scene_4.visual_suggestion: Real clinic data showing before and after no-show rates, with a thumbs-up icon.

scene_5.text: In 2025, leading clinics won't make patients wait. At all.
scene_5.visual_suggestion: Future-focused imagery of a modern clinic with satisfied patients.

cta.text: Book a free 15-minute demo at voicecare.ai/demo.
cta.visual_suggestion: Text overlay with animated cursor clicking on a demo booking link.
